summary: Phase 5 Portfolio & Reactivation Engine testing complete. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - portfolio dashboard and admin overview pages working correctly.

issues: Staff pages don't have a sidebar navigation - 'My Portfolio' link defined in staff-sidebar-links.js but no sidebar component renders it. Users must navigate directly to /staff/portfolio

action_items: Consider adding a staff sidebar component that uses staff-sidebar-links.js to provide navigation (low priority - direct URL navigation works)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features work, minor navigation UX issue)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Sales: neema.sales@konekt.demo / Sales123!, Customer: demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123!
seed_data_creation: Test data from previous iterations used (Neema owns 6 clients, 4 reactivation tasks)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Portfolio & Reactivation Engine complete. All features verified: (1) GET /api/sales/portfolio returns portfolio with total_clients, buckets, clients, total_revenue, (2) Client classification working (active <=60 days, at_risk 60-89, inactive 90-179, lost 180+), (3) GET /api/sales/portfolio/tasks returns reactivation tasks, (4) POST /api/sales/portfolio/generate-tasks creates tasks idempotently, (5) PUT /api/sales/portfolio/tasks/{taskId} updates status/outcome, (6) GET /api/admin/portfolio/overview returns all owners with stats, (7) GET /api/admin/portfolio/{salesId} returns specific owner portfolio, (8) POST /api/admin/portfolio/{salesId}/generate-tasks works, (9) Customer gets 403 on all portfolio endpoints, (10) Sales gets 403 on admin portfolio endpoints, (11) Portfolio page at /staff/portfolio shows KPI cards, tasks, client list with filters, (12) Admin portfolio overview at /admin/portfolio-overview shows owner table, (13) Task outcome buttons work (reactivated, no_response, not_interested, lost), (14) Regression tests pass for client ownership and sales performance.

1_sales_portfolio_endpoint.details: Returns total_clients, buckets (active/at_risk/inactive/lost), clients array, total_revenue

2_client_classification.details: Active (<=60 days), At Risk (60-89 days), Inactive (90-179 days), Lost (180+ days)

3_reactivation_tasks_endpoint.details: Returns tasks array with id, entity_name, status, classification, suggested_action

4_generate_tasks_idempotent.details: Creates tasks for at-risk/inactive clients, no duplicates on repeat calls

5_update_task_outcome.details: Updates status and outcome (reactivated, no_response, not_interested, lost)

6_admin_portfolio_overview.details: Returns owners array with sales_id, sales_name, companies, individuals, pending_tasks, reactivation_rate

7_admin_owner_portfolio.details: Returns specific owner's full portfolio data

8_admin_generate_tasks.details: Admin can generate tasks for any sales owner

12_portfolio_ui_kpi_cards.details: Portfolio page shows Total Clients, Active, At Risk, Inactive, Revenue, Overdue Tasks cards

13_portfolio_ui_tasks.details: Reactivation tasks section shows task cards with outcome buttons

14_portfolio_ui_client_list.details: Client list with filter tabs (All, Active, At Risk, Inactive, Lost)

15_portfolio_ui_generate_btn.details: Generate Tasks button present and functional

16_admin_overview_ui.details: Admin portfolio overview shows summary stats and owner table

17_admin_sidebar_link.details: Portfolio Overview link present in admin sidebar

18_staff_sidebar_link.details: My Portfolio link defined in config but staff pages don't have sidebar - direct URL navigation works

19_regression_client_ownership.details: Client ownership stats, companies, individuals endpoints still work

20_regression_sales_performance.details: Sales performance team and my performance endpoints still work
